inputs.label: Marketing Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Total amount spent on marketing activities such as advertising, digital marketing, content production.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total amount spent on marketing activities such as advertising, digital marketing, content production.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Reklam, dijital pazarlama, içerik üretimi gibi pazarlama faaliyetlerine harcanan toplam tutar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtausgaben für Marketingaktivitäten wie Werbung, digitales Marketing und Content-Erstellung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant total dépensé pour les activités marketing telles que publicité, marketing numérique, création de contenu.
businessContext_i18n.es: Monto total gastado en actividades de marketing como publicidad, marketing digital, creación de contenido.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي المبلغ المنفق على الأنشطة التسويقية مثل الإعلانات والتسويق الرقمي وإنتاج المحتوى.

inputs.label: Selling Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Sales team salaries, commissions, travel and entertainment expenses.

businessContext_i18n.en: Sales team salaries, commissions, travel and entertainment expenses.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Satış ekibi maaşları, komisyonlar, seyahat ve ağırlama giderleri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gehälter des Vertriebsteams, Provisionen, Reise- und Bewirtungskosten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Salaires de l'équipe commerciale, commissions, frais de déplacement et de représentation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Salarios del equipo de ventas, comisiones, gastos de viaje y entretenimiento.
businessContext_i18n.ar: رواتب فريق المبيعات والعمولات والسفر ومصاريف الضيافة.

inputs.label: Technology and Software Expenses
inputs.businessContext: CRM, marketing automation, analytics tools, etc. software and technology expenses.

businessContext_i18n.en: Software and technology expenses such as CRM, marketing automation, analytics tools, etc.
businessContext_i18n.tr: CRM, pazarlama otomasyonu, analitik araçları vb. yazılım ve teknoloji giderleri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Ausgaben für Software und Technologie wie CRM, Marketingautomatisierung, Analysetools usw.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dépenses logicielles et technologiques pour CRM, automatisation marketing, outils d'analyse, etc.
businessContext_i18n.es: Gastos de software y tecnología como CRM, automatización de marketing, herramientas de análisis, etc.
businessContext_i18n.ar: مصاريف البرمجيات والتكنولوجيا مثل CRM وأتمتة التسويق وأدوات التحليل وغيرها.

inputs.label: Other Acquisition Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Other customer acquisition costs such as events, fairs, PR.

businessContext_i18n.en: Other customer acquisition costs such as events, fairs, PR.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Etkinlik, fuar, PR gibi diğer müşteri edinim maliyetleri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Sonstige Kundenakquisitionskosten wie Events, Messen, PR.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Autres coûts d'acquisition de clients tels qu'événements, salons, relations publiques.
businessContext_i18n.es: Otros costos de adquisición de clientes como eventos, ferias, relaciones públicas.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تكاليف اكتساب العملاء الأخرى مثل الفعاليات والمعارض والعلاقات العامة.

inputs.label: Yeni Müşteri Sayısı
inputs.businessContext: Total number of new customers acquired in the specified period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of new customers acquired in the specified period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Belirtilen dönemde kazanılan toplam yeni müşteri sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der im angegebenen Zeitraum gewonnenen Neukunden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de nouveaux clients acquis au cours de la période spécifiée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Total de nuevos clientes adquiridos en el período especificado.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي عدد العملاء الجدد المكتسبين في الفترة المحددة.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
